message:
test(wave-21): add 24 unit tests for distributed/sheaf, oracle/determinism

Cover NodeSnapshot/SagaConstraint/ConsistencyReport/PairwiseConflict/PhantomState/
ConstraintViolation/ObligationDetail data types and DeterminismViolation Display/
Error/Clone, TraceEventSummary Display/Clone, DeterminismOracle builder and trace
comparison.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
